29/* #if defined(SCALE_DEPENDENT) && defined(ELL_CLASSIC) */
30/* #error Trying to compile with ELL_CLASSIC and SCALE_DEPENDENT together */
31/* #endif */
32
33#if defined(MOD_GRAV_FR) && !defined(SCALE_DEPENDENT)
34#define SCALE_DEPENDENT
35#endif
36
37#ifndef SCALE_DEPENDENT
38#define NkBINS 1
39#else
40#define NkBINS 10
41#define LOGKMIN ((double)-3.0)
42#define DELTALOGK ((double)0.5)
43#endif
44
45#define SP_TIME 0
46#define SP_INVTIME 1
47#define SP_COMVDIST 2
48#define SP_DIAMDIST 3
49#define SP_INVGROW 4
50#define SP_MASSVAR 5
51#define SP_DISPVAR 6
52#define SP_RADIUS 7
53#define SP_DVARDR 8
54
55#define SP_GROW1 (9)
56#define SP_GROW2 (9 + NkBINS)
57#define SP_GROW31 (9 + 2 * NkBINS)
58#define SP_GROW32 (9 + 3 * NkBINS)
59#define SP_FOMEGA1 (9 + 4 * NkBINS)
60#define SP_FOMEGA2 (9 + 5 * NkBINS)
61#define SP_FOMEGA31 (9 + 6 * NkBINS)
62#define SP_FOMEGA32 (9 + 7 * NkBINS)
63
64#define SP_PK (9 + 8 * NkBINS)
65#define SP_EOS (9 + 8 * NkBINS + 1)
66#define SP_INTEOS (9 + 8 * NkBINS + 2)
67
68#define NSPLINES_BASE (9 + 8 * NkBINS + 3)
69
70#ifdef READ_HUBBLE_TABLE
71#define SP_EXT_HUBBLE (NSPLINES_BASE)
72#define NSPLINES (NSPLINES_BASE + 1)
73#else
74#define NSPLINES (NSPLINES_BASE)
75#endif
